description: Espresso/back-counter circuit at Maple Street Cafe has tripped four times in two months. Load testing shows the 20A circuit runs near rating during the morning rush. Root cause is undersized shared circuit, not a faulty breaker. Recommending a dedicated 20A line for the espresso machine.
short_description: Root-cause analysis - recurring breaker trips at Maple Street Cafe

description: Brighton Pointe parking lot heads keep failing on the northeast pole. Three drivers replaced since fall. Suspect water intrusion at the pole base hand hole degrading the supply conductors. Recommending re-seal and conductor inspection.
short_description: Root-cause analysis - repeat pole light failures at Brighton Pointe

description: Walk-in cooler at Sharon Hill Pharmacy keeps tripping its breaker on compressor start. Locked-rotor current exceeds the shared circuit headroom. Root cause is a shared circuit and aging start components. Proposing dedicated circuit and contactor/cap replacement.
short_description: Root-cause analysis - cooler breaker trips at Sharon Hill Pharmacy

description: Folsom Trade Center emergency light batteries fail the quarterly test repeatedly across the same three units. These units are original to the 2013 build and at end of life. Root cause is fixture age. Recommending phased replacement of all emergency units.
short_description: Root-cause analysis - recurring emergency battery failures at Folsom Trade Center

description: Westgate Commons has seen repeat GFCI trips and low-voltage driver failures after every utility blink this winter. Root cause is the lack of building-level surge protection. Recommending a service-entrance SPD plus point-of-use protection for sensitive loads.
short_description: Root-cause analysis - surge-related failures at Westgate Commons

description: Concord Crossing walkway bollards have failed twice in a season due to landscaping damage to direct-buried wiring. Root cause is shallow conductor burial in a planting bed. Recommending conduit rework and depth correction.
short_description: Root-cause analysis - repeat bollard wiring damage at Concord Crossing

description: Drexel Hill Dry Cleaners dryer circuit has overheated twice. Pattern points to undersized terminations and a high-cycle 30A load on a panel with marginal bus condition. Root cause is termination heating. Proposing panel feeder inspection and possible breaker upgrade.
short_description: Root-cause analysis - recurring dryer circuit overheating at Drexel Hill Dry Cleaners

description: Aldan Business Center exterior lighting runs during daylight on and off. Two photocells replaced in three months. Root cause is voltage on the lighting circuit fluctuating from a shared contactor and aging sensors. Recommending dedicated lighting contactor and timeclock.
short_description: Root-cause analysis - repeat photocell failures at Aldan Business Center

description: Westgate Commons unit 6 lost a leg twice this quarter. Both events trace to loose neutral terminations on the panel feeder bus. Root cause is original aluminum feeder terminations relaxing under thermal cycling. Recommending re-termination with antioxidant and torque audit.
short_description: Root-cause analysis - recurring loose neutral at Westgate Commons unit 6

description: Marple Crossing loading dock heads keep going dark. Three LED drivers in six months on the same two poles. Root cause is overheating in poorly ventilated pole tops facing afternoon sun. Recommending high-temp rated drivers and ventilation.
short_description: Root-cause analysis - repeat driver failures at Marple Crossing dock

description: Lansdowne Medical Plaza break room GFCI nuisance trips recur under high-draw appliances. Two devices replaced. Root cause is multiple high-wattage appliances on one GFCI-protected circuit. Recommending circuit split for microwave and fridge.
short_description: Root-cause analysis - recurring GFCI trips at Lansdowne break room

description: Glenolden Self Storage curbside pedestal GFCI fails after rain events, killing the gate operator. Root cause is a cracked in-use cover allowing water ingress at the pedestal. Recommending bubble cover replacement and gasket seal at all exterior receptacles.
short_description: Root-cause analysis - recurring gate power loss at Glenolden Self Storage

description: Broad Street Hardware aisle lighting flickers across multiple fixtures. Relamping does not hold. Root cause is failing magnetic ballasts at end of life throughout the aisle. Recommending full LED retrofit to eliminate ballasts.
short_description: Root-cause analysis - chronic ballast failures at Broad Street Hardware

description: Yeadon Corner Market channel-letter sign loses letters repeatedly. Two power supplies replaced. Root cause is moisture in the raceway corroding LED module connections. Recommending raceway reseal and weatherproof modules.
short_description: Root-cause analysis - repeat sign lighting failures at Yeadon Corner Market

description: Concord Crossing EV charger has faulted to ground-fault lockout three times. Root cause is moisture ingress at the J1772 holster on the exposed pedestal. Recommending holster cover and drip loop correction.
short_description: Root-cause analysis - recurring EV charger ground faults at Concord Crossing

description: Delco Plaza unit 4 exit/emergency combo has failed the egress test twice. The unit is past its service life and the battery no longer holds 90 minutes reliably. Root cause is end-of-life fixture. Recommending replacement of all original combo units in the plaza.
short_description: Root-cause analysis - repeat exit light failures at Delco Plaza

description: Springfield Commerce Plaza suite 2 has had two dead-circuit calls from backstabbed devices failing. Root cause is original builder-grade backstab wiring relaxing over time. Recommending proactive device replacement with side-wire terminations on affected circuits.
short_description: Root-cause analysis - recurring open-neutral faults at Springfield Commerce suite 2

description: Ridgeway Office Park stairwell emergency units fail the 90-minute test in clusters. Batteries are all the same vintage and aging together. Root cause is synchronized battery aging. Recommending a tracked replacement schedule by install date.
short_description: Root-cause analysis - clustered emergency battery failures at Ridgeway Office Park

description: Hargrove jobsite panels arrive at handover with mislabeled or blank directories on multiple occasions. Root cause is rough-in circuits being moved during finish without directory updates. Recommending a standing as-built circuit verification step before each handover.
short_description: Root-cause analysis - recurring directory mislabels at Hargrove handovers

description: Maple Street Cafe restroom occupancy sensor switches fail early. Two replaced. Root cause is heat and humidity from the adjacent kitchen degrading the sensor electronics. Recommending a humidity-rated sensor or relocating the sensor head.
short_description: Root-cause analysis - repeat occupancy sensor failures at Maple Street Cafe
